task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Jeep Wrangler (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $32690.00 and wholesale is $24956.00. Product features: Iconic off-road SUV with removable top and doors and 4x4 capability. Reference: https://www.jeep.com/wrangler.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Jeep Wrangler. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Jeep Wrangler. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
